description_long: This is a decorative vertical banner featuring a vivid green fabric with a beige border and a striking black dragon emblem at its center. The banner is suspended from a horizontal rod, which appears to be made of a light-colored material, possibly wood or plastic, with pointed finials at each end. Two fabric loops attach the banner securely to the rod, ensuring it hangs flat and straight. The bottom edge of the banner is cut into a shallow V-shape, adding a traditional and heraldic touch. The dragon design is bold and stylized, making the banner suitable for thematic or ceremonial urban settings. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and intended for display rather than heavy-duty use.
description: A green vertical banner with a beige border and a black dragon emblem, suspended from a light-colored rod with pointed ends. The banner hangs flat with a V-shaped bottom and is attached by two fabric loops.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green banner with beige border and black dragon emblem, clearly displaying the V-shaped bottom and the supporting rod.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the banner and rod, with the finial and fabric thickness visible but no design details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the green banner, beige border, and dragon emblem visible, as well as the supporting rod and loops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rod's end and the thinness of the banner from the side.
